title: Bytes, Object Representation, Alignment, Padding, and Endianness · C Contract Brief: Struct Padding Layout
summary: A device protocol works on one architecture but leaks padding and faults on a stricter-alignment target. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem struct padding layout increment in portable binary representation codec. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Measure rather than assume member offsets, tail padding, and layout changes across ABI targets.
Compute and satisfy fundamental, extended, member, and allocated alignment requirements before access.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Struct Padding Layout · Theory Struct Padding Layout
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 1231. Produce bounded C evidence to encode values without copying native padding; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Measure rather than assume member offsets, tail padding, and layout changes across ABI targets.
